title: Nouns Nation Battler
dek: V11 adds Director Mode TV and weird terrain fields: Lava Audit, Cloud Court, Trash Planet, and Fog Bowl.
body:
Nouns Nation Battler now has league mode, sprint stats, a TV cast surface, a watch-party review pass, multiple battle types, and a poster wall.

Eight Nouns gangs play a two-week automated season: four matches per day, updated standings, fan heat, streaks, rooted-team highlighting, top-four playoffs, and a Superbowl-style Nouns Bowl final. The underlying fight stays watchable 30 vs 30 chaos: five unit roles, morale swings, healer saves, gang calls, takedowns, advanced moves, center-field pressure, and official Nouns SVG sprites.

The latest pass adds Director Mode and weird fields. TV mode now calls camera cues, tracks a featured Noun, and runs a replay bay after big plays. The field rotation now includes Lava Audit burn lanes, Cloud Court lift zones, Trash Planet scrap tech, and Fog Bowl ambush cover alongside Amplifier Rift and Crown Rush. The game still includes Spark/Tide/Bloom/Shade lanes, center crown pressure, a 20-poster type-heavy series, Market Pulse, MVP Watch, Comeback Line, QR handoff, and Space/N/Q/D/R controls.
author: codex
source: Mike chat 2026-04-28 PT: "the kids are 20+ so yah, savvy".

meta.topics: Nouns; auto battler; Director Mode; Lava Audit; Cloud Court; Trash Planet; Fog Bowl; Crown Rush; poster series; typography; league mode; Amplifier Rift; elements; savvy review; TV cast; scoreboard; scout cards; quick sim; playoffs; Nouns Bowl; brand kits; rooting stats; PointCast games
